title: `anah #6030
definition:
1) to answer, respond, testify, speak, shout
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to answer, respond to
        1a2) to testify, respond as a witness
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to make answer
        1b2) to be answered, receive answer
 2) (Qal) to sing, utter tunefully
 3) (Qal) to dwell
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to answer, respond, testify, speak, shout
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to answer, respond to
        1a2) to testify, respond as a witness
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to make answer
        1b2) to be answered, receive answer
 2) (Qal) to sing, utter tunefully
 3) (Qal) to dwell

    NASB:  to answer, respond
